{{CargoOrgan
|name=Cockatrice Gut
|type=Common
|rank=purple
|id=10942
|idx=66
|description=Harvested from a creature lurking where WiFi signals fear to tread. Legend says only Witchers with 5G hotspot spells can track them.
|skill=
|hp=1508
|def=159
|atk=180
|rush=143
|gene1=Gene Research Free Speedup +10m
|gene2=Earth DMG +60
|gene3=In explorations, Demon God Cells collected +4%
|gene4=Gene Research Free Speedup +10m
|gene7=Gene Research Free Speedup +30m (Awakened)
|}}
